feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: ECC Inbound delivery was not found in EWM system
entry.content:
Dear Experts, 

My Inbound Delivery was distributed in ECC, but it was not found in EWM system. I checked SMQ1 and SMQ2, it showed no problem. Then I checked SLG1, the message showed that DN was distributed to EWM system, and the Queue was distributed to EWM system. 

I run SMQ2, activate manually the Queue, the message showed "Could not determine a logical system for system S4CLNT210"

We used the Embedded EWM system. What is the problem?

Vincent

entry.title: Step by Step Process to de-kit an assembly with BOM or previous Production Order
entry.content: Not new but new to this process. Looking for a step by step process on how to take an assembly and de-kit it. Non-EWM. Want to be able to create a de-kit production order with no OH only materials. Want to be able to enter a previously closed Production Order or BOM to identify all the components to be reversed. Read a few online suggestions but they didn't have enough information for us to attempt this in our Dev system. Any and all help will be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: User management (SU01) / Work Center / Function field length
entry.content:
In transaction SU01, under the 'Address' tab and the 'Work Center' sub-tab, we can find the 'Function' field. This field has a character limit of 40. This is insufficient for our purposes.

How do you handle this? Do you give every employee only a short job function? Or do you use another field?

entry.title: How to replace the existing hosts with new servers in HANA System Replication
entry.content:
Hi,

we have HANA system replication setup as below, which is a multi-target landscape.

Primary ---> HA
Primary ---> DR

We're going to replace current hosts with new servers.
Currently, the primary and HA hosts are located in the same data center, while DR is running on the other Data Center.

Could you please let me know how to complete replacing the hosts with new ones ?

Thanks

 

Koti 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Item was saved inconsistently /SCDL/BO
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am a newer in EWM. I want to create WT by TCODE "/SCWM/PRDI - Maintain Inbound Delivery ", and the error showed "There are no unpacked or packed warehouse request items for processing, Message No. SCWM/UI_TODLV002". I checked the Inbound Delivery tab 'Validation', the message was "Item was saved inconsistently".

Do you have any possible suggestions? We used the embedded EWM in HANA.

Regards

Vincent

entry.title: SAP DBTech JDBC: [1034]: exceed maximum number of external connections: 30000
entry.content:
We are encountering the following issue, which is causing the application to crash with an OutOfMemoryError:

2025-05-14T11:32:28.083+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] STDOUT {"msg":"HikariPool-f8fa4104-4da3-4158-ac34-e9144a6bf5f5#4b96fab2-0f12-4d41-855e-049c6b52e5af - Exception during pool initialization.","tenant_id":"4b96fab2-0f12-4d41-855e-049c6b52e5af","level":"ERROR","written_ts":"1747222348082802136","logger":"com.zaxxer.hikari.pool.HikariPool","exception_type":"com.sap.db.jdbc.exceptions.JDBCDriverException","correlation_id":"9693e6ef-192f-421c-9224-c98ece3f4e28","written_at":"2025-05-14T11:32:28.082Z","thread":"Draft GC Timer","type":"log","exception_message":"SAP DBTech JDBC: [1034]: exceed maximum number of external connections: 30000","stacktrace":["com.sap.db.jdbc.exceptions.JDBCDriverException: SAP DBTech JDBC: [1034]: exceed maximum number of external connections: 30000","\tat com.sap.db.jdbc.exceptions.SQLExceptionSapDB._newInstance(SQLExceptionSapDB.java:209)","\tat com.sap.db.jdbc.exceptions.SQLExceptionSapDB.newInstance(SQLExceptionSapDB.java:42)","\tat com.sap.db.jdbc.packet.HReplyPacket._buildExceptionChain(HReplyPacket.java:842)","\tat com.sap.db.jdbc.packet.HReplyPacket.getSQLExceptionChain(HReplyPacket.java:196)","\tat com.sap.db.jdbc.packet.HReplyPacket.findSQLExceptionChain(HReplyPacket.java:670)","\tat com.sap.db.util.security.AuthenticationManager.authenticate(AuthenticationManager.java:197)","\tat com.sap.db.util.security.AuthenticationManager.authenticate(AuthenticationManager.java:196)","\tat com.sap.db.jdbc.ConnectionSapDB._authenticateAndConnectSession(ConnectionSapDB.java:6672)","\tat com.sap.db.jdbc.ConnectionSapDB._connectAnchor(ConnectionSapDB.java:3483)","\tat com.sap.db.jdbc.DriverSapDB._connect(DriverSapDB.java:3428)","\tat com.sap.db.jdbc.DriverSapDB.connect(DriverSapDB.java:3013)","\tat com.zaxxer.hikari.util.DriverDataSource.getConnection(DriverDataSource.java:138)","\tat com.zaxxer.hikari.pool.PoolBase.newConnection(PoolBase.java:359)","\tat com.zaxxer.hikari.pool.PoolBase.newPoolEntry(PoolBase.java:201)","\tat com.zaxxer.hikari.pool.HikariPool.createPoolEntry(HikariPool.java:470)","\tat com.zaxxer.hikari.pool.HikariPool.checkFailFast(HikariPool.java:561)","\tat com.zaxxer.hikari.pool.HikariPool.<init>(HikariPool.java:100)","\tat com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource.getConnection(HikariDataSource.java:112)","\tat entry.title: Number assignment for packaging material type XXXX not maintained
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

When I do Packing for Inbound Delivery, the Error showed "Number assignment for packaging material type 0002 not maintained, Message No. /SCWM/HU_WM071". I haven't found such Number Assignment in Configuration.

Could you please help me? We used Embedded EWM in HANA.

Regards

Vincent

entry.title: Document not shown in Generic Object Sevices on delivery item level
entry.content:
Hi all,

using ArchiveLink we have a reference to a document in the Archive-System. The link is on item level in the delivery. We see an entry in Link-Table TOA02 and can access the archived document using transaction OAER.

The document was created using output control on item level. Customizing of output type and Archive link seem ok.

But we cannot access the document from delivery item level, it is not shown in the Generic Object Sevices (Attachment list).

What is missing?
Kind regards Elko

entry.title: Compounded key value in AFO BOBJ report output
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
We use BOBJ reports based on AFO(Analysis for Office) and these reports are based on CDS views in SAP. We have recently upgraded our S4 system to 2023 version and post upgrade, we started seeing compounded values for some of the fields in the BOBJ output.
In the output of the report, we use formula SAPLISTOFEFFECTIVEFILTERS to display the filters that are used to run the query and in this, post upgrade we are getting compounded values(Combination of all key fields in corresponding table) instead of single values(Specific field value).
Have you come across this situation. If yes, can you please guide how to avoid this and show single values.
In below screenshot, Main transaction should show 0040, instead it is compounding with another key field from the table Application area which always has value 'R'.

Thank you,

Amarendra.

entry.title: tcode CNMASSCREATE - no error message when loading file
entry.content:
Hi. 

When loading an Excel file to SAP tcode CNMASSCREATE there were duplicate WBS records.  The file did not load however there was no error message to advise what the issue was.  Running the tcode in debug mode  identified the issue.

We are using S4/Hana; Version 2021 with no support pack.

entry.title: Could not determine ERP stock data for: E211 G1000 F2
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

When I created+Save WT, the error showed as bellow screen shot:

I checked the configuration, it seemed no problem.

Could you please give me any suggestion?

Regards

Vincent

entry.title: Check Horizon Zero Confirmation and BPS scheduling with Working Times getting unconfirmed quantities
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am currently facing an issue with sales orders not getting confirmed when Scope of aATP is defined with Check Horizon - Zero Confirmation (see below) and BPS is active for scheduling with Working Times assigned to specific activities (Load).

Although Scheduling is working as expected and considering the activities that have been defined and attributes durations and working times when maintained, I am facing an issue with Sales Orders quantities not getting confirmed.

1. BPS is active and activity Load has been set up with durations and working time

2. Activity Pick maintained only with durations

3. There is plenty of stock available for this material

4. Check horizon is 14 days (end lead time: 02.06.2025). So anything before that date should be confirmed with current stocks. However, see below for the ATP screen (no quantity confirmed)

This seems to be somehow affected by the Workime Time assigned to activity load for the characteristic combination assigned. 

The working time was defined with shifts on Mondays,  Tuesdays and Wednesdays of 1 minute, meaning in this case that GI can only happen at 18h00 on these 3 days.

From a Scheduling perspective, everything works perfectly fine (as you can see above). However, Availability Check is not confirming quantities with the Zero Confirmation Scope Horizon setup as it seems to get in conflict with the working times assigned in scheduling for later activities. However, this should not be relevant as Material Availability Date is always the date taken into account to determine availability.

Any idea or can someone please provide some inputs? 

Thanks a lot!!!

entry.title: Export Delivery Header Data (LIKP) to Application Server(AL11) as CSV File
entry.content:
" Table declaration for delivery header
TABLES: LIKP.

" Selection screen for delivery number range and output file path
SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF BLOCK B1 WITH FRAME TITLE TEXT-001.
  SELECT-OPTIONS : S_VBELN FOR LIKP-VBELN.      " Delivery numbers
  PARAMETERS     : P_FILE   TYPE CHAR120.       " Directory path on application server
SELECTION-SCREEN END OF BLOCK B1.

" F4 Help to select file path from the application server (AL11)
AT SELECTION-SCREEN ON VALUE-REQUEST FOR P_FILE.
  CALL FUNCTION '/SAPDMC/LSM_F4_SERVER_FILE'
    EXPORTING
      DIRECTORY        = SPACE                  " Optional: Can be restricted to a specific directory
      FILEMASK         = SPACE                  " Optional: Restrict file types if needed
    IMPORTING
      SERVERFILE       = P_FILE                 " Selected file path
    EXCEPTIONS
      CANCELED_BY_USER = 1
      OTHERS           = 2.

  " Local variable to store the selected physical path (not used further here)
  DATA(G_PHYSICAL_PATH) = P_FILE.

" Start of the main program logic
START-OF-SELECTION.

  " Fetch delivery header data for selected VBELNs
  SELECT VBELN, ERNAM, ERZET, VKORG, VSTEL
    FROM LIKP
    INTO TABLE @DATA(LT_LIKP)
    WHERE VBELN IN @S_VBELN.

  " Convert the internal table to CSV format using standard SAP function
  DATA: LT_CSV TYPE TRUXS_T_TEXT_DATA.

  CALL FUNCTION 'SAP_CONVERT_TO_CSV_FORMAT'
    EXPORTING
      I_FIELD_SEPERATOR    = ';'                " Use semicolon as delimiter
*     I_LINE_HEADER        =                    " Optional: Add header line
*     I_FILENAME           =                    " Not needed here
*     I_APPL_KEEP          = ' '                " Not relevant for this use case
    TABLES
      I_TAB_SAP_DATA       = LT_LIKP            " Data to be converted
    CHANGING
      I_TAB_CONVERTED_DATA = LT_CSV             " Output table in CSV format
    EXCEPTIONS
      CONVERSION_FAILED    = 1
      OTHERS               = 2.

  IF SY-SUBRC <> 0.
    " TODO: Add error message handling
  ENDIF.

  " Concatenate the final file name with directory path and date
  CONCATENATE P_FILE '\Likp_' SY-DATUM INTO DATA(P1_FILE).

  " Open file for writing on the application server in text mode
  OPEN DATASET P1_FILE FOR OUTPUT IN TEXT MODE ENCODING DEFAULT.

  " Write CSV data line-by-line to the file
  LOOP AT LT_CSV INTO DATA(LS_CSV).
    TRANSFER LS_CSV TO P1_FILE.
  ENDLOOP.

  " Close the file after writing
  CLOSE DATASET P1_FILE.

entry.title: SAP HANA Log Restore Using NetBackup on a Different System
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have a HANA database (log mode: normal) that is being backed up via NetBackup — both full data backups and log backups.

Now I’m restoring the backups to a different HANA system.

Here are my two scenarios:

Scenario 1 – Restore Only Logs After Full Backup Already Restored:

I have already restored the full backup from 9 PM.

Now I want to restore only the log backups, on top of that, without re-restoring the full backup.

But when I try to do that, it starts restoring the full backup again.

→ How can I restore only the logs after full backup is already restored?

Scenario 2 – Restore Logs Up to a Specific Time:

I want to restore logs only up to two hours after the full backup (i.e., until 11 PM).

How can I control the log restore process to stop at a specific point in time?

Any help or step-by-step guidance (using HANA Studio, or Backint) would be really appreciated.

Thanks a lot!

entry.title: ATC Configuration for Custom code analysis
entry.content:
Hi Team,

ATC Configuration: to include the our satellite system in to the ATC Central system for Custom code analysis. Both systems are on HANA database.

Thanks & Regards.

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Custom Consignment Process
entry.content:
Dear Gurus, I will explain my requirement and my configuration knowledge on this.

Requirement: I want to issue the stock (material 1) to customer A. but not to be billed. Customer A will sale the material 1 to another 50 different customers and i need to bill the 50 different customers not customer A.  Now when i am creating consignment issue to other 50 different customers, the stock should get deducted from the customer A consignment stock.

My Thought: I want to create consignment fill up to Customer 1000 with material M10. Now customer 1000 will again sell the material M10 to 10 other end customers. I want to create Consignment Issue to 10 end customers for the same material M10, while doing PGI, the M10 stock has to pick from "Customer 1000's consignment stock". Not from the unrestricted stock of my inventory. 

I know the standard Consignment process where Fill up and Issue to the same customer. But here i required to Fill up to one customer and Issue to other customers.

My functional expertise is not enough for this requirement. Requesting anyone who can fulfil this.

Please through some light and help me out of this requirement.

entry.title: PREP_GENCHECKS/EU_NAMETAB_CHECKERORR during upgrade from 1809 to 2023
entry.content:
i got this error when try to upgrade form 1809 to 2023

"Severe error(s) occurred in phase PREP_GENCHECKS/EU_NAMETAB_CHECK!"
A2 EEXP 017 Table DDNTT will be exported joined with fields table.
A3EESTR 001 Error for '/TMF/V_CC405_001': Field count 14 differs from header field count 0
A3EEEXP 008 Task failed with error: (EXP) Found 1 problems in data
A3EEEXP 008 (EXP) Table name is 'DDNTT'

can somebody help with this error?

entry.title: Error- Identification of Condition SAP TDMS Time Slice Option
entry.content:
Hi,

We are getting the error while running the TDMS Time Slice project during the step 'Update of TDMS Header Tables with Business Process Data' at Step 'Identification of Condition Data'

Error in Log

We have raised an incident with SAP 336077/2025 we are still waiting for solution its been many weeks.

SAP advised to run the below query in Sender system which we have successfully executed and provided the results.

( SELECT a.knumv FROM SAPABAP1.LIKP as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.CNVTDMS_05_VBUK as b on a.VBELN = b.VBELN WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION ( SELECT a.knump FROM SAPABAP1.LIKP as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.CNVTDMS_05_VBUK as b on a.VBELN = b.VBELN WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION ( SELECT a.knumv FROM SAPABAP1.VBAK as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.CNVTDMS_05_VBUK as b on a.VBELN = b.VBELN WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION ( SELECT a.knumv FROM SAPABAP1.VBRK as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.CNVTDMS_05_VBUK as b on a.VBELN = b.VBELN WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION ( SELECT a.knumv FROM SAPABAP1.EKBE as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.CNVTDMS_05_EKKO as b on a.ebeln = b.ebeln WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION ( SELECT a.knumv FROM SAPABAP1.EKKO as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.CNVTDMS_05_EKKO as b on a.ebeln = b.ebeln WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION SELECT KNUMV FROM SAPABAP1.EKBEH WHERE MANDT = 800 AND BUDAT >= 20240601 UNION ( SELECT a.knumv FROM SAPABAP1.WBRK as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.CNVTDMS_05_WBRK as b on a.wbeln = b.wbeln WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION ( SELECT a.knumvd FROM SAPABAP1.WBRK as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.CNVTDMS_05_WBRK as b on a.wbeln = b.wbeln WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION SELECT KKNUMV FROM SAPABAP1.ESLL WHERE ( BUDAT >= 20240601 OR BUDAT = 00000000 ) OR ( INSDT >= 20240601 OR INSDT = 00000000 ) UNION ( SELECT a.knumv FROM SAPABAP1.ESLH as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.ESLL as b on a.packno = b.packno WHERE b.MANDT = 800 AND ( b.BUDAT >= 20240601 OR b.BUDAT = 00000000 OR b.INSDT >= 20240601 OR b.INSDT = 00000000 ) ) UNION SELECT knumv FROM SAPABAP1.rbdrseg WHERE ( BUDAT >= 20240601 ) UNION SELECT knumv FROM SAPABAP1.vfkp WHERE ( BUDAT >= 20240601 ) OR ( prsdt >= 20240601 ) UNION ( SELECT a.eknum FROM SAPABAP1.wkbp as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.cnvtdms_05_wkbk as b on a.kbeln = b.kbeln WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION ( SELECT a.vknum FROM SAPABAP1.wkbp as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.cnvtdms_05_wkbk as b on a.kbeln = b.kbeln WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION ( SELECT a.cknum FROM SAPABAP1.wkbp as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.cnvtdms_05_wkbk as b on a.kbeln = b.kbeln WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION ( SELECT a.knumv_sd FROM SAPABAP1.wbhk as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.cnvtdms_05_wbhk as b on a.tkonn = b.tkonn WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION ( SELECT a.knumv_mm FROM SAPABAP1.wbhd as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.cnvtdms_05_wbhk as b on a.tkonn = b.tkonn WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION SELECT knumv FROM "SAPABAP1"."/DBM/SPLHDR_DB" WHERE MANDT = 800 UNION SELECT h_knumv FROM "SAPABAP1"."/DBM/VBAK_DB" WHERE MANDT = 800 

We are facing this issue after the migrate our database to SAP Hana and we have upgrade the TDMS Backend component to DMIS and DMIS_CNT 2011_1_731 to SP 0027.

Can some pls provide the solution.

SAP Test Data Migration Server SAP HANA, express edition

entry.title: XSA - CAP: xsuaadomain is missing in credentials
entry.content:
We are developing a CAP Application for Hana XSA. I deployed a node.js Backend and an Approuter. I have bound the xsuaa-service to both apps.
If I now try to get data from my odata-service, i receive an error: Error while authenticating user: XsuaaService is missing the properties uaadomain inside its credentials for: fetch JWKS.

I have tried to set the uaadomain in the credentials manually. But this has no effect.I have also tried to deploy the app without Approuter and Xsuaa, but when I do, I get the error message that authentication is required.

Link to Github GitHub

entry.title: SAP HANA Replication task(.hdbreptask) - runtime object?
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I intend to document the hdbreptasks which were created in my project. The list is more than 50 and the idea is to have access to view/table in which the rep tasks can be accessed along with the tables configured in it.

I tried multiple system views and could not find a one which gives me data. 

Any help is appreciated.
